data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Enables secure transactions by encrypting data throughout transmission.
data.technical_spec: Use of HTTPS, TLS 1.2/1.3 for all communications.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Protection against Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: AWS Shield Advanced and custom traffic filtering rules.

data.title: Intrusion Detection Systems
data.description: Monitor traffic and detect potential threats in real-time.
data.technical_spec: AWS GuardDuty and network monitoring tools.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Control over who can access specific resources and data.

data.title: Data Loss Prevention
data.description: Prevents unauthorized data transfers and potential information breaches.
data.technical_spec: Data encryption at rest and in transit, and regular security audits.
